## Working agreement (read first)

- This file is GENERATED from `.agents/manifest.yaml`. Do NOT edit it directly — edit the manifest and run `harness sync`.
- Before finishing any change, run `harness verify`; it enforces the invariants listed below.
- If you learn something an agent could not infer from the code (a gotcha, a decision), record it under `.agents/knowledge/`.

## Commands

- `setup`: `pnpm install`
- `build`: `pnpm build`
- `test`: `pnpm test`
- `lint`: `pnpm lint`
- `verify`: `harness verify`

## Invariants (must hold)

- No stray console.log left in source [enforced]
- Do not hardcode secrets / tokens in source [enforced]

Run `harness verify` to check the enforceable ones.

## Knowledge

Deeper context lives in `.agents/knowledge/` (domain, conventions, decisions/journal).

Task playbooks: `.agents/playbooks/`.
